subject: You have received an ASMALLWORLD Private Message
body:
The ASW Team has sent you a private message on ASMALLWORLD.

The subject is "Important ASW Update"

To read your private message please click here
[http://asmallworld.net/index_mailshow.php?id=22805385]



Thank you,

The ASW Team

-------------

To unsubscribe from this service or change your ASW e-mail alert preferences
click here [http://www.asmallworld.net/my_settings/alert.php]

If you forgot your ASW password click here
[http://www.asmallworld.net/lost_password.php]

To update your ASW profile click here
[http://www.asmallworld.net/profile/index.php]
